sentence: 咖啡散发出浓郁的香气。
pinyin: Kā fēi sàn fā chū nóng yù de xiāng qì.
english: The coffee gives off a rich, strong aroma.

sentence: 他爬上梯子把坏掉的灯泡换掉了。
pinyin: Tā pá shàng tī zi bǎ huài diào de dēng pào huàn diào le.
english: He climbed up the ladder and replaced the broken light bulb.

sentence: 这个词的涵义比较复杂。
pinyin: Zhège cí de hányì bǐjiào fùzá.
english: The meaning of this word is fairly complex.

sentence: 青春期的孩子情绪变化比较大。
pinyin: Qīngchūnqī de háizi qíngxù biànhuà bǐjiào dà.
english: Children going through puberty tend to have bigger emotional swings.

meaning: 1. every time; 2. on each occasion; 3. whenever
sentence: 每逢过年，全家人都聚在一起吃饭。
pinyin: Měi féng guò nián, quán jiā rén dōu jù zài yī qǐ chī fàn.
english: Every time the New Year comes, the whole family gathers to eat together.
